title: PwShGUICore path registry uses 3-argument Join-Path incompatible with PS 5.1
description: Initialize-CorePaths in PwShGUICore.psm1 used 14 instances of Join-Path with 3 positional arguments (Join-Path $ScriptDir 'config' 'file.json') which fails in PowerShell 5.1. Fixed by pre-resolving intermediate directory variables ($cfgDir, $modDir, $rdmDir) and using 2-argument Join-Path throughout.

fix_applied.description: Pre-resolve intermediate directories ($cfgDir, $modDir, $rdmDir) then use 2-argument Join-Path for all nested file paths. Follows same pattern as CronAiAthon module fixes.
fix_applied.pattern: Pre-resolve parent dir then Join-Path $dir 'file' instead of Join-Path $root 'dir' 'file'
